hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.claude/agents/*.md|*/.agents/*) repo="$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; [ -n "$repo" ] && git -C "$repo" diff --quiet -- "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo "⚠ Agent file changed — remember to commit + push: $f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
